items.title: A Natural History of William Kentridge’s Studio

items.title: What You Can’t Miss at Upstate Art Weekend
items.summary: The art extravaganza in New York’s Hudson Valley and Catskills is back with a retrospective of Betty Parsons, a tailgate-style exhibition, living sculptures, and more.
